name: tapfs
description: Mount enterprise REST APIs as files. Browse Jira, GitHub, Salesforce, and 10+ services with standard file tools.

connector.description: Connector name (github, jira, salesforce, slack, notion, hubspot, stripe, zendesk, pagerduty, linear, servicenow, confluence) or path to custom YAML spec

apiToken.description: API token or key for authentication

mountPoint.description: Local directory where APIs are mounted (default: /tmp/tap)
